modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help installing and setting up GoToMeeting

full_description_text: 
El usuario no sabe como instalar GoToMeeting. Estaba tratando de usarlo para una reunión. No puede encontrar la manera de configurarlo. Necesita ayuda para que funcione.
short_description: Need help installing and setting up GoToMeeting
description: El usuario no sabe como instalar GoToMeeting. Estaba tratando de usarlo para una reunión. No puede encontrar la manera de configurarlo. Necesita ayuda para que funcione.
